# Legion Core State Machines

The transition matrices below are generated from `STATE_MACHINE_TRANSITION_MATRICES`.

| `change` | 15 | `accepted`, `rejected`, `archived`, `invalidated`, `canceled` | 5 |
| `task` | 13 | `completed`, `failed`, `superseded`, `invalidated`, `canceled` | 18 |
| `taskRun` | 11 | `succeeded`, `failed`, `superseded`, `invalidated`, `canceled` | 10 |
| `review` | 12 | `accepted`, `rejected`, `superseded`, `invalidated`, `canceled` | 6 |
| `approval` | 11 | `granted`, `denied`, `expired`, `revoked`, `invalidated`, `canceled` | 2 |
| `integration` | 10 | `effect_succeeded`, `effect_failed`, `invalidated`, `canceled` | 3 |
| `release` | 15 | `healthy`, `rolled_back`, `forward_fix_required`, `superseded`, `invalidated`, `canceled` | 10 |
| `observation` | 14 | `healthy`, `failed`, `rolled_back`, `forward_fix_required`, `invalidated`, `canceled` | 12 |
